_comment_credentials: STEP 1: Angel One credentials. Get from smartapi.angelbroking.com → login → 'My Apps'. NEVER commit this file to git.
_comment_symbols: STEP 2: NSE Cash symbols to scan. Format: SYMBOL-EQ (Angel One convention). Below is Nifty 100. Remove/add as needed.
_comment_scanner: STEP 3: Scanner behavior tuning. Defaults are sensible; adjust after paper-trading.

scanner.__COMMENT_PREDICTION_TRACKER: Phase 1 - Signal Accuracy Self-Validation. हर actionable signal पर price capture, फिर N seconds बाद check कि actually correct direction में गयी या नहीं। Real-time proof कि signals predict करते हैं या नहीं। JSONL में सब audit trail।

_comment_engine: STEP 4: BookDynamicsEngine tuning. Every field below can ALSO be overridden per-run via CLI (e.g. --w-iceberg 1.0). CLI wins over config.json.

engine._comment_thresholds: Empirically calibrated on 67k+ live NSE signals. Smoothed score practically caps around ±5 due to 8-feature weighted average + EMA α=0.3. Old defaults 8.0/5.0/2.0 were unreachable — STRONG_LONG never fired.
engine._comment_feature_weights: Weight of each composite feature. Reduce w_book_wide_imbalance if you suspect deep-book spoofing. w_iceberg is 0 by default (feature was dead code until Nov 2026); set to 1.0 to enable hidden-liquidity signal.
engine._comment_regime_gate: Opt-in regime-aware gates. Both default false for backwards compatibility. regime_gate_enabled: demote signals to NEUTRAL in RANDOM regime. regime_invert_mean_reverting: flip LONG↔SHORT in confirmed MEAN_REVERTING (contrarian mode).
engine._comment_ema_warmup: Suppress signals for the first N ticks so EMA can converge past its neutral seed. Fixes 9:15 AM Cold-Start Trap where a single noise tick pinned the EMA for 2-3 min. 50 ≈ 10 seconds at 5 tps. Set 0 to disable.
engine._comment_spoof: spoof_dampener_strength: fraction of conviction reduced when spoofing_suspicion=1. Set 0.0 to disable while validating spoof detector. spoof_max_delta_qty: pulls above this share count are treated as institutional executions, not spoofs (default 0 = OFF). Recommended 10000 for Nifty50 large caps.
engine._comment_aggressor_window: Rolling window (seconds) for buy-vs-sell aggressor volume ratio. Default 5.0. Shorten to 2.0 in slow afternoon markets so old institutional prints don't poison the ratio.
engine._comment_iceberg_hold: ±bps window around a tracked level within which a trade counts as 'near' the iceberg. Default 5.0. Widen to 10.0 to catch fast sweeps that jump multiple ticks in one event.
engine._comment_kill_switch: Kill-switch triggers when spread exceeds median × N. Default 3.0. Set 2.0 for tighter fast-market protection.
engine._comment_v2_backports: V2 'Sniper Edition' backports. All default to disabled/passive so existing users see no behavior change. Enable per your needs. See CLI --help for detailed guidance.
engine._comment_l1_gate: Force f_l1=0 in composite when spread widens beyond this many bps (illiquidity-trap defense). Default 999 = disabled. Try 5.0 for Nifty50 large caps where wide spread + thin ask can produce misleading L1=+0.95 signals.
engine._comment_kill_max_bps: Absolute-bps ceiling for kill switch. Forces SUPPRESSED whenever current spread exceeds this value, in addition to the multiplier-based check above. Default 999 = disabled. Set 5.0 for tight-market discipline.
engine._comment_score_mode: Composite score aggregation. 'average' (default) divides by total sum-of-weights. 'confluence' divides by weight-of-active-features only (features whose |value| > active_feature_threshold). Rationale: neutral features shouldn't dilute strong signals from features that do agree.
engine._comment_exit_signals: Emit EXIT_LONG / EXIT_SHORT when L1 imbalance flips against the last actionable direction by more than exit_l1_flip_threshold. EXIT states are close-position signals, deliberately NOT in _ACTIONABLE_STATES so the hit-rate recorder ignores them.
